ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player is currently on */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., guard, forward, center) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's current contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's current contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team for the game */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team for the game */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season the game is part of */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (e.g., stadium name) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division within the conference */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "team_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current coach (foreign key to coaches table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season (e.g., Regular, Playoffs) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "playoff_teams" TEXT /* List of teams that made the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is currently with */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the coach has */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Coach's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Coach's nationality */,
  "coaching_records" TEXT /* Detailed coaching records (e.g., win-loss records) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance analytics entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being analyzed */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game related to the analytics */,
  "efficiency_rating" REAL /* Efficiency rating calculated for the player */,
  "impact_score" REAL /* Impact score based on a combination of metrics */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace of the game (possessions per 48 minutes) */,
  "usage_percentage" REAL /* Usage percentage, the percentage of team plays used by the player */,
  "win_shares" REAL /* Win shares, a measure of the player's contribution to the team's wins */,
  "value_over_replacement_player" REAL /* Value over replacement player, a measure of the player's value compared to a replacement-level player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_analytics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_analytics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Coach, Analyst, Admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role in the system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the platform */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
column_names: Team the player is currently on
